data.body: ROUND-2 remediation applied (feedback from the 2nd review pass: 3 BLOCK + advisory triage). BLOCKs resolved decisively: WS2 hedge detector = exec:1-TURN finder (NOT exec:DET -- verified DET scans code ASTs, strips before pass1_chunk, stamps validity=1.0 bypassing Pass-2); WS3 redesigned to two LLM-routed OVERLAY criteria (T10/T11 pattern via route_criteria) instead of an unspecified G1G2->orchestrator trigger signal -- preserves the reliable-detection + own-context-window intent, codebase-native; WS10 deep-link base URL specified (REBAR_DOCS_URL env else relative file://, config.py constant) + anchor rule + MCP/CLI dispatch + error states. Factual errors corrected: MOVE_REGISTRY is passes.py:686 not coach.py (WS8); _slim EXCLUDES evidence[] so T3 four-class is Pass-1-evidence-only, sidecar persistence out of scope (WS5); sidecar test is test_sidecar_enrichment.py not the invented name (WS9); shared-preamble hooks existing _resolve_system passes.py:237 not a new layer (WS7); ADR is 0016-project-det-invariants.md (WS4). Enumerated all previously-delegated sets in-ticket: nine E6 verify-cmd patterns, three T3 axes, four evidence classes, three G3 patterns (WS5). na-default reconciled with the derived-field loop in verify.py + validity() (WS1). Behavioral proofs redirected from mocked unit tests to the eval-spec harness (WS6/WS7). ISF cohort = singleton [ISF] (WS9). file_impact updated for changed targets. Epic gained an integration-ordering section (shared verifier prompts/docs/routing/passes) + an eval-guarded definition. About to re-run the review pass (epic + WS1-WS11).
